title: An Act addressing a vacancy in the office of mayor in the city of Holyoke

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Duffy of Holyoke, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5332) of Patricia A. Duffy (with the approval of the mayor and city council) relative to electing certain city officials and filling related vacancies.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 05/13/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in B-1

Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
